title: pentameris rosea subsp. rosea
intro: Pentameris rosea subsp. rosea, also known as the Pink Woodrush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pentameris rosea subsp. rosea include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function, making it a popular herbal remedy for asthma and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
